text:
I Can Read!
SHARED
My
First
READING
Biscuit's
New Trick
by ALYSSA SATIN CAPUCILLI
pictures by PAT SCHORIES

Here, Biscuit!
Look what I have.
Woof, woof!
5

It's time to learn
a new trick, Biscuit.
Woof, woof!
6
It's time to learn
to fetch the ball.
Ready?
7

Fetch the ball, Biscuit.
Woof, woof!
8
Silly puppy!
Don't roll over now.
Get the ball, Biscuit.
9

Fetch the ball, Biscuit.
Woof, woof!
Where are you going,
Biscuit?
Woof!
11

Funny puppy!
Fetch the ball,
not your bone.
12
Let's try again.
Fetch the ball, Biscuit!
Woof, woof!
13

Good puppy!
You got the ball.
Woof!
14

Wait, Biscuit.
16
Bring the ball back!
Woof, woof!
17

Let's try one more time.
Fetch the ball, Biscuit!
Woof, woof!
18
Oh no!
Not in the mud!

Stop, Biscuit!
Don't fetch it now!
Woof!

You did it!
You learned a new trick!
Woof, woof!
24
